title: solanum dulcamara var. ovatum
intro: Solanum dulcamara var. ovatum, also known as the woody nightshade or oval-leaved bittersweet, is a variety of the Solanum dulcamara plant, which belongs to the nightshade family of flowering plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solanum dulcamara var. ovatum include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and swelling, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
